SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus

Interface IMessageBus

public interface IMessageBus
Interface for the Smart Home Message Bus (Connection Manager).

The Message Bus is a pub/sub system that decouples components from one another. All inter-component communication — registration, commands, events, heartbeats — flows through the bus. Components register themselves, subscribe to the topics they care about, and publish messages when they have information to share.

The bus guarantees that any message published to a topic is delivered to all current subscribers of that topic.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    createTopic(TopicType topic)
    Creates a new topic on the message bus if it does not already exist.
    <T> void
    publish(Message<T> message)
    Publishes a message to its designated topic.
    void
    register(String nodeId)
    Registers a component or node with the message bus.
    void
    subscribe(String nodeId, TopicType topic, Consumer<Message<?>> handler)
    Subscribes a component to a topic so that it receives all messages published to that topic.
    void
    unregister(String nodeId)
    Unregisters a component from the message bus.
    void
    unsubscribe(String nodeId, TopicType topic)
    Unsubscribes a component from a topic.

  • Method Details

    • register

      void register(String nodeId)
      Registers a component or node with the message bus. Must be called before a component can publish or subscribe.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - a unique identifier for the registering component
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if a node with this ID is already registered

    • unregister

      void unregister(String nodeId)
      Unregisters a component from the message bus. All active subscriptions for this node are removed.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - the ID of the component to unregister

    • createTopic

      void createTopic(TopicType topic)
      Creates a new topic on the message bus if it does not already exist. Should be called during system startup before components subscribe.
      Parameters:
      topic - the topic to create

    • subscribe

      void subscribe(String nodeId, TopicType topic, Consumer<Message<?>> handler)
      Subscribes a component to a topic so that it receives all messages published to that topic.

      The provided handler is invoked each time a new message arrives on the topic. The handler must be thread-safe, as it may be called concurrently.

      Parameters:
      nodeId - the ID of the subscribing component
      topic - the topic to subscribe to
      handler - a callback invoked with each incoming Message
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the topic does not exist

    • unsubscribe

      void unsubscribe(String nodeId, TopicType topic)
      Unsubscribes a component from a topic. After this call, the component's handler will no longer be invoked for messages on that topic.
      Parameters:
      nodeId - the ID of the component to unsubscribe
      topic - the topic to unsubscribe from

    • publish

      <T> void publish(Message<T> message)
      Publishes a message to its designated topic. All components currently subscribed to the message's topic will receive it.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the message payload
      Parameters:
      message - the message to publish; its TopicType determines which subscribers receive it
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the topic in the message does not exist
